title: Soul Bowl Product Launch
tagline: Cost-smart labelling and packaging that turned a new Jerk Spice Rub into a shelf standout — and drove traffic at a local food expo.
description: Soul Bowl asked us to develop labelling and packaging formats for their new Jerk Spice Rub, an offshoot to their successful catering solutions. The brief was to keep a cost-efficient solution to labelling and boxed packaging. In addition, some simple point-of-sale was required to help drive traffic to their stand at a local food expo. This was delivered within four weeks, from concept to completion.
